creator: sjorge+signup@blackdot.be
text:
Some extra information:

I was able to replicate this on all 4 of my VMs, the only thing they all have in common are:
- FreeBSD 13.0-RELEASE-p4 #0: Tue Aug 24 07:33:27 UTC 2021     root@amd64-builder.daemonology.net:/usr/obj/usr/src/amd64.amd64/sys/GENERIC
- Running in Bhyve (illumos)
- PCI Passthru for the nics (mix of igb and ixl, I350 and X722 chipsets respectively)
- CARP
